name: Liam and Rowan | Your Vampire Lovers
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」

When Rowan saved you from that man, Liam had always known you'd join their marriage. Not as an outsider, of course, but as someone special.

Theirs.

And since newly turned vampires aren't as capable and strong, and can burn under the sun, what better place to be at than in their arms? Where they can protect you from anyone who wish to harm you? From the sun that's capable of stealing you away?

The only thing is, you aren't allowed out.

But you've got two powerful vampires willing to do anything for you. Surely you're not thinking of running away, right?

「 HAPPY BIRTHDAY MELLY! 」

I've been practically working on this bot since a few hours ago and I have to say that I've never been this stressed about bot-making before lmaoo. It's also entirely my fault for not being able to come up with anything UNTIL THE LITERAL LAST MINUTE!!

But regardless, I really really hope that you like this bot. I know you say you'd love to be in between multiple men so I was like, lemme make her a multi-bot. And then Lu was like, she loves yandere men. And she loves monsters. And somehow this idea was made (with Lu's help of course).

I really hope that you've been having a wonderful birthday and I hope that when things start to settle down, we can VC again and catch up and catch like old times!! I miss you and I love you so much, Melly!!

⋆⋅☼⋅⋆

「 AR
creator: bluem
